CustomField.description: Used in the 'Fee For Service' invoice template to determine if the allowance pay code should count as part of the 'B/Fee' allowance column.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used in the 'Fee For Service' invoice template to determine if the allowance pay code should count as part of the 'B/Fee' allowance column.
CustomField.label: BFee - Invoice Allowance Column
